briefdescription.para: Mailbox of the LTE monitor task.

detaileddescription.para: One shot timer provides delay for IMSI and IMEI reading + printing

briefdescription.para: The AT monitor to catch all notifications.
The AT monitor to receive the link quality.
The AT monitor to catch network notifications.
The LTE modem battery voltage in [mV].
The LTE modem link quality in [dBm].
The LTE modem temperature in [°C].

detaileddescription.para: Flag indicating if power saving mode is enabled or not

briefdescription.para: TAU period and active time granted by operator [sec].

detaileddescription.para: Requested periodic TAU timer value (Tracking Area Update)

briefdescription.para: Requested active timer value.
The IMEI string.
The IMSI string.
The firmware version string.
LTE monitor task constructor.

detaileddescription.para:
name
The name of the class
The constructor allocate and register a mailbox and allocates and initialize the one shot IMSI and IMEI read timer with duration of 5 ms.

briefdescription.para: LTE monitor task destructor.

detaileddescription.para: The destructor is never called and is implemented only for completion reasons. It simply triggers a debug message on info debug level.

briefdescription.para: MQTT connector task function.

detaileddescription.para:
Initially the function initialize the modem information library by calling function modem_info_init provided by the modem information library. The one shot IMSI / IMEI read timer will be started and firmware version will be retrieved by call of function getFwVersion provided from version module. Afterwards the function enters the endless loop and wait for messages. Task wakes up when a message is in the mailbox and read the message by calling mailbox read method which returns the pointer pElem to the message. All expected messages will be handled, in case of an unexpected message an error debug message will be triggered. Finally the message will be released by calling class PoolElem method free, if the pointer pElem is not explicitly set to 0.
Message Handling:
eTimerExpired: On timer expiry the pointer pElem will be set to 0, to prevent releasing the message because it is allocated static. Afterwards the function read and print out IMSI and IMEI by calling the member functions getIMSI and getIMEI. Afterwards
eLteLinkQuality: On receiving the link quality from AT handler callback function at_ecsq_handler, the link quality value will be extracted from message payload and stored in private member variable linkQuality.
eLteReport: On receiving LTE report request from data manger task, LTE modem specific data will be read by calling the functions psm_read, getIMSI, getBattVoltage and getTemperature. These informations will be reported to data manger task by call of the functions reportLinkQuality, reportIMSI, reportPsmAct, reportBattVoltage and reportTemperature.
that the sequence of the reports matters, since the receiver deduces "metrics complete" when modem voltage and temperature are received

briefdescription.para: Timer expired function for the IMSI / IMEI read timer.

detaileddescription.para: The function initializes the static pool element e1 with message type eTimerExpired, set LTE connector as sender and put message into own (LTE monitor's) mailbox.

briefdescription.para: Send IMEI to the receiver mailbox.

detaileddescription.para:
toWhom
ID of the receiver mailbox, where to send the message, default is ID eDataManager
The function send a message of type eLteIMEI with attached IMEI to mailbox toWhom by calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class.

briefdescription.para: Send IMSI to the receiver mailbox.

detaileddescription.para:
toWhom
ID of the receiver mailbox, where to send the message, default is ID eDataManager
The function send a message of type eLteIMSI with attached IMSI to mailbox toWhom by calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class.

briefdescription.para: Send modem battery voltage to the receiver mailbox.

detaileddescription.para:
toWhom
ID of the receiver mailbox, where to send the message, default is ID eDataManager
The function send a message of type eLteBattVoltage with attached battery voltage to mailbox toWhom by calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class.

briefdescription.para: Send modem temperature to the receiver mailbox.

detaileddescription.para:
toWhom
ID of the receiver mailbox, where to send the message, default is ID eDataManager
The function send a message of type eLteTemperature with attached temperature to mailbox toWhom by calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class.

briefdescription.para: Send link quality value to the receiver mailbox.

detaileddescription.para:
toWhom
ID of the receiver mailbox, where to send the message, default is ID eDataManager
The function send a message of type eLteLinkQuality with attached link quality to mailbox toWhom by calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class.

briefdescription.para: Send firmware version of the modem software to the receiver mailbox.

detaileddescription.para:
toWhom
ID of the receiver mailbox, where to send the message, default is ID eDataManager
The function send a message of type eLteFwVersion with attached firmware version to mailbox toWhom by calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class.

briefdescription.para: Send TAU period and active time to the receiver mailbox.

detaileddescription.para:
toWhom
ID of the receiver mailbox, where to send the message, default is ID eDataManager
The function send a message of type eLteIMEI with attached TAU period and active time in structure psm_act to mailbox toWhom by calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class.

briefdescription.para: Function to retrieve power saving mode informations of the modem.

detaileddescription.para: The method send the AT command "Power saving mode setting" +CPSMS to the modem and read the formatted response into the arguments psm_enabled, request_periodic_tau and request_active_time by calling function nrf_modem_at_scanf provided by the modem library of nrfxlib provided by Nordic semiconductor. In case of an error the method returns immediately. See Command Reference Guide, page 88ff for details. Afterwards function lte_lc_psm_get is called for getting the current PSM (Power Saving Mode) configurations for periodic TAU (Tracking Area Update) and active time, both in units of seconds. In case of an error the method returns immediately.

briefdescription.para: Timer callback function for the IMSI / IMEI read timer.

detaileddescription.para:
timer
Pointer to timer of type k_timer
The function retrieve the user-specific data from the timer by calling kernel function k_timer_user_data_get and call MQTT connector timer expired function timer1_expired.

briefdescription.para: Function to resume the AT monitor for all notifications.

detaileddescription.para:
By call of function at_monitor_resume, provided by the AT monitor library this method resumes the AT monitor for all notifications.
This function is unused and will never called

briefdescription.para: Handler callback function to receive all notifications.

detaileddescription.para:
notif
Pointer to the notification string
The function only prints a debug message al information level.
This function is unused and will never called

briefdescription.para: Function to subscribe to signal quality notifications.

detaileddescription.para: By call of function nrf_modem_at_printf, provided by the modem library of nrfxlib this method send the AT command CESQ with parameter 1 to the modem to enable link quality notifications, which will be received by the link quality AT monitor handler callback function at_ecsq_handler. See Command Reference Guide, page 19f for details.

briefdescription.para: Function to resume the AT monitor for link quality notifications.

detaileddescription.para: By call of function at_monitor_resume, provided by the AT monitor library this method resumes the AT monitor for link quality notifications.

briefdescription.para: Handler callback function to receive link quality notifications.

detaileddescription.para:
notif
Pointer to the notification string
The function transforms the notification into an integer dBm value. If the dBm value is invalid the function returns immediately, otherwise the function send a message of type eLteLinkQualitywith attached link quality dBm to its own (LTE monitor's) mailbox by calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class.

briefdescription.para: Function to set network registration status.

detaileddescription.para: By call of function nrf_modem_at_printf, provided by the modem library of nrfxlib this method send the AT command +CEREG with parameter 1 to the modem to enable unsolicited status result codes, which will be received by the network AT monitor handler callback function at_cereg_handler. See Command Reference Guide, page 97f for details.

briefdescription.para: Function to resume the AT monitor for network notifications.

detaileddescription.para: By call of function at_monitor_resume, provided by the AT monitor library this method resumes the AT monitor for network notifications.

briefdescription.para: Handler callback function to receive network notifications.

detaileddescription.para:
notif
Pointer to the notification string
The function transforms the notification into an integer status value and cast it to enumeration type enum cereg_status to pass it into function cereg_str_get to get the status in string format.

briefdescription.para: Function to get network notification status as string.

detaileddescription.para:
status
Status of enumeration type enum cereg_status
Returns the network notification status as string
The function returns a string for the network notification status according to input parameter status of enumeration type enum cereg_status.

briefdescription.para: Function to retrieve the battery voltage of the modem.

detaileddescription.para:
The battery voltage in mV
The method retrieves the battery voltage of the modem by calling function modem_info_get_batt_voltage provided by the modem information library of the nRF Connect SDK and store it in member variable battVoltage.

briefdescription.para: Function to retrieve the temperature of the modem.

detaileddescription.para:
The temperature value in °C
The method retrieves the temperature of the modem by calling function modem_info_get_temperature provided by the modem information library of the nRF Connect SDK and store it in member variable temperature.

briefdescription.para: Function to retrieve the firmware version of the modem software.

detaileddescription.para:
Ponter to the firmware version of the modem software
The method retrieves the firmware version of the modem software by calling function modem_info_get_fw_version provided by the modem information library of the nRF Connect SDK and store it in member variable fw_version.

briefdescription.para: Function to retrieve the IMEI.

detaileddescription.para:
0 on success, error code otherwise
The method retrieves the IMEI by calling function modem_info_string_get provided by the modem information library of the nRF Connect SDK. In case of an error the function returns error code -EIO, otherwise the received IMEI will be stored in member variable imei and function returns 0.

briefdescription.para: Function to retrieve the IMSI.

detaileddescription.para:
0 on success, error code otherwise
The method retrieves the IMSI by calling function modem_info_string_get provided by the modem information library of the nRF Connect SDK. In case of an error the function returns error code -EIO, otherwise the received IMSI will be stored in member variable imsi and function returns 0.

briefdescription.para: LTE monitor class derived from task base class.

xrefdescription.para:
RMS task receives the acceleration raw data from ADXL data store task, calculate RMS and with the help of class HitDetector hit values. RMS, medium and critical hit values will be send to RMS store task together with a timestamp. The class provides an idle detection timer, and for medium and critical hit detection an instance of class HitDetector. It provides the function update_rms to calculate RMS and hit values and to send them to the RMS store task.
Receive
Timer interrupt callback
RMS task (self)
ADXL data store task
Transmit
RMS store task
RMS task (self, transmission in timer callback)
